# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup for serverless event processing architecture

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - development
      - staging
      - production
    Description: Environment name for resource tagging and naming

  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
    Description: Message retention period in seconds (default 4 days)

  VisibilityTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 300
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
    Description: Visibility timeout in seconds (default 5 minutes)

  MaxReceiveCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 100
    Description: Max receive count before sending to dead letter queue

  DelaySeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 0
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 900
    Description: Delay seconds for messages entering the queue

  MaxMessageSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 262144
    MinValue: 1024
    MaxValue: 262144
    Description: Maximum message size in bytes (default 256KB)

Resources:
  # Dead Letter Queue for failed message processing
  EventDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-dlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: dead-letter-queue
        - Key: Project
          Value: serverless-event-processing

  # Main SQS Queue for event processing
  EventProcessingQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DependsOn: EventDeadLetterQueue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-queue'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout
      DelaySeconds: !Ref DelaySeconds
      MaximumMessageSize: !Ref MaxMessageSize
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt EventDeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: !Ref MaxReceiveCount
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: event-processing
        - Key: Project
          Value: serverless-event-processing

  # SNS Topic for pub/sub event distribution
  EventNotificationTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-notification-topic'
      DisplayName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName} Event Notification Topic'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: event-notification
        - Key: Project
          Value: serverless-event-processing

  # SNS Topic Policy to control who can publish and subscribe
  EventNotificationTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref EventNotificationTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: EventNotificationTopicPolicy
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAccountPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AWS::AccountId
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
              - sns:Subscribe
              - sns:ListSubscriptionsByTopic
              - sns:GetTopicAttributes
            Resource: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchAlarms
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
          - Sid: AllowS3EventNotifications
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

  # SNS Subscription to forward messages from SNS topic to SQS queue
  SQSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true
      FilterPolicyScope: MessageBody
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt EventDeadLetterQueue.Arn

  # SQS Queue Policy to allow SNS to send messages and allow account operations
  EventProcessingQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueue
        - !Ref EventDeadLetterQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: EventProcessingQueuePolicy
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSSendMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
          - Sid: AllowAccountQueueOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
              - sqs:PurgeQueue
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
              - !GetAtt EventDeadLetterQueue.Arn
          - Sid: AllowDLQRedrive
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventDeadLetterQueue.Arn

  # CloudWatch Alarm for DLQ message monitoring
  DeadLetterQueueAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-dlq-messages-alarm'
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when messages appear in the dead letter queue
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt EventDeadLetterQueue.QueueName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref EventNotificationTopic

  # CloudWatch Alarm for main queue depth monitoring
  QueueDepthAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-queue-depth-alarm'
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when queue depth exceeds threshold indicating processing delays
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.QueueName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 3
      Threshold: 1000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref EventNotificationTopic

Outputs:
  EventProcessingQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the main event processing SQS queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingQueueURL'

  EventProcessingQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the main event processing SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingQueueArn'

  EventProcessingQueueName:
    Description: Name of the main event processing SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.QueueName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingQueueName'

  EventDeadLetterQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the dead letter queue
    Value: !Ref EventDeadLetterQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventDeadLetterQueueURL'

  EventDeadLetterQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the dead letter queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventDeadLetterQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventDeadLetterQueueArn'

  EventNotificationTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS notification topic
    Value: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventNotificationTopicArn'

  EventNotificationTopicName:
    Description: Name of the SNS notification topic
    Value: !GetAtt EventNotificationTopic.TopicName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventNotificationTopicName'

  SubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS to SQS subscription
    Value: !Ref SQSSubscription
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-SNSSQSSubscriptionArn'
